Short title and com m encem ent.— (1) T hese rules m ay be called the C inem atograph (Certification) ,(A m endm ent) R ules, 1994. , (2 ) T hey shall com e into force on the date of th eir publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the C inem atograph (Certification) R ules, 1983,— (1 ) in rule 22,— (a) in sub-rule ( 2 ) ,— (i) in clause (a), after the w ords “ exam ining o ^ c e r ”, the following ■ w ords shall be inserted, nam ely :—- “ eithar of whom shall be a w om an,” ; (ii) in clause ( b ) , after the words “ exam ining officer” , the follow ing w ords shall be inserted, nam ely ;— " o f whonif two persons shall be wom en (b) in sub-rule (1 4 ), after the w ord “ fo*ur'’, the following shall be added, nam ely :— , “ of whom at least two persons shall be w om en.” (2) In the C inem atograph (Certification) R ules, 1983, in rule 22, in sub rale (2 ), after the first proviso, the following proviso shall be added, nam ely :- “Provided fu rth er th a t in the E xam ining Com m ittee, in a case falling under ( a ) one m em ber shall be a wom an and in a case falling clause (b) two m em bers shall be w om en.” . , [File No. 8 0 2 |5 |9 4 -F (C )] S H A R W A R E E G O K H A L E , Jt.
